explanation: This command uses reg.exe to delete the Windows Defender context menu handler registry key, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It includes quotes for safe parsing and uses standard syntax.
This PowerShell command removes the registry key using the Remove-Item cmdlet, which aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of 'Remove-Item'. It is formatted with quotes for safe parsing.
This command uses PowerShell Core (pwsh) with the 'del' alias for Remove-Item to delete the registry key. It matches the Sigma rule's detection of 'del' and includes safe parsing with quotes.
